HARNESS-01.desc: natural-language harness specs load and validate with required sections

HARNESS-02.desc: rendered harness plans substitute inputs into natural-language steps

HARNESS-03.desc: harness plans compile into executable async-job-runner stages

HARNESS-04.desc: runHarness executes a harness through the runtime with checkpoints and verification

HARNESS-05.desc: MCP surfaces expose list_harnesses and run_harness operations

HARNESS-06.desc: full verification includes the harness proof lane and artifact
